title: Earnings Previews: AbbVie, Humana, Marathon Petroleum, Novartis
text: U.S. equity markets opened mixed on Monday, with the Dow Jones industrials lagging and the tech-heavy Nasdaq adding about 1.5% in the early going.

title: Union, Marathon continue talks as deadline looms for U.S. refinery strikes
text: The United Steelworkers union (USW) and lead oil company negotiator Marathon Petroleum face an early Tuesday deadline to agree on a new contract for U.S. refinery and chemical plant workers, said sources familiar with the talks.

title: Can Marathon (MPC) Q4 Earnings Maintain Positive Surprise?
text: Marathon Petroleum (MPC) beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate in each of the last four quarters, delivering an earnings surprise of 31.9%, on average.

title: 3 Oil-And-Gas Stocks Holding Up During Market Pullback
text: The energy sector is leading the way so far in 2022. Despite the prominence of “big oil,” there are lesser-known or smaller companies from the sector that have also held up well despite the broad-market correction.

title: Why I'm Bullish Again On Marathon Petroleum
text: Marathon Petroleum has used over half of its 2021 Speedway proceeds to repurchase stock. The $7.5 billion in remaining buybacks post-3Q21 offers significant support to MPC's equity price. This $46 billion market cap company, a 63% owner of $32.1 billion mid-streamer MPLX, currently pays a regular dividend of 3.1%.

title: 7 of the Best Energy Stocks for 2022 to Buy Now
text: Continuing demand increases and continued inflation give investors a chance to buy these traditional and alternative energy stocks. The post 7 of the Best Energy Stocks for 2022 to Buy Now appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: 2 Energy Names for Growth and Income
text: The energy sector is often filled with high dividend yields, but this area of the economy can also offer attractive levels of growth. With the price of a barrel of oil approaching $80, most energy companies are likely to see strong results in the coming quarters after having a difficult time the past couple of years.
